prompt:
A single pH test strip rests on a neutral-colored lab bench beside a narrow glass of clear liquid, its indicator pads showing a multicolored gradient across the length of the strip. A small plastic tray holds a few additional unused strips in the background, but the main strip is centered and clearly visible, emphasizing that it is a disposable, one-time-use test. Nearby, a simple glass dropper or pipette hints at how a drop of solution was placed onto the strip.

The environment is a clean near-future home lab with a solarpunk aesthetic: soft daylight, a leafy plant near the edge of the frame, and a few neatly organized lab tools and containers. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with light stylization, no brands or readable text, and a minimal composition that centers the single pH strip and its subtle color pattern while the rest of the workspace remains softly blurred.
